# Repid

> Repid is a simple, fast, and extensible async task queue framework, with built-in AsyncAPI 3.0 schema generation.

Repid is a simple, fast, and extensible async task queue framework for Python 3.10+, featuring built-in AsyncAPI 3.0 schema generation.

## Getting Started

- [Glossary](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/getting_started/glossary/index.md)
- [Quickstart](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/getting_started/quickstart/index.md)
- [Supported Brokers](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/getting_started/supported_brokers/index.md)

## Core Concepts

- [Dependency Injection](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/dependency_injection/index.md)
- [Message Registry](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/message_registry/index.md)
- [Messages](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/messages/index.md)
- [Raw Message & Eager Response](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/raw_message_and_eager_response/index.md)
- [Server Registry](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/server_registry/index.md)
- [Server Specific Parameters](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/server_specific_parameters/index.md)
- [Basics](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/actors/index.md)
- [Confirmation Modes & Error Handling](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/actors/confirmation_and_errors/index.md)
- [Execution & Timeouts](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/actors/execution/index.md)

- [Routing Strategies](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/actors/routing/index.md)
- [Basics](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/workers/index.md)
- [Built-in Servers](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/workers/built_in_servers/index.md)
- [Concurrency Limits](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/workers/concurrency/index.md)
- [Lifecycle & Production](https://repid.aleksul.space/latest/user_guide/workers/lifecycle/index.md)
